attachments.fallback: How to Backup Gmail Mailboxes? - @ialexx (Alex Harvey)
attachments.text:
To back up your Gmail mailbox, you can use several reliable tools. Google Takeout is the official method, allowing you to export your entire mailbox in .mbox format.

If you have lots of data and want to do it effortlessly, you can consider some third-party tools.

Note: Before buying any tool, you have to do your research to avoid fraud.
attachments.title: How to Backup Gmail Mailboxes? [How-to Discussions]
